programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party - Brand new series
programme.desc: Rachel, Steven, Scott, Danny and Bec face off following a rather risqué argument during the Couples' Retreat.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share their insightful and passionate takes on the best TV shows from series 21.

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Pop star Preston of Big Brother fame, Scarlett Moffatt, rock chick Jo Wood and Britain's Got Talent winner Ashleigh Butler visit the restaurant for dates with members of the public.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Recently divorced Leanne wants an experimental guy to share her new-found love of sex and ice cream. Ex-US marine Conor has seen plenty of action but struggles to talk to women.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After a divisive week away, it's dinner party time again - and the mood is extremely combustible. Then again, it wouldn't be MAFS if it wasn't..

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britain's sharpest armchair critics share their insightful and passionate takes on the best TV shows from series 21.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria persuades Jay to commit to a night of salsa dancing after seeing how much his friend Shorty and his girlfriend do together. Phil builds a tree house for Luke.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay's relationship with the dog irritates Gloria. Phil and Luke try to master the tightrope. Cameron starts a juice fast.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica and Geoff compete against Barry and Joanne to see who's the best couple. Adam gets a job to prove his independence to Brea.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is cast in the star role in the school play. Barry tries to capitalise on Erica's breakup with Geoff.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Rally Cars: Adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high and take to the sky on his big day, but his straight-talking bride Lynsey wants more personal, no-nonsense nuptials.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cam settle on their new normal, and Phil and Claire decide that one of the kids needs to move out so they can take control of the house again.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In the last ever episode, the entire family discover that saying goodbye is much harder than it seems.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon revisits Café Hon in Baltimore, Chiarella's in Philadelphia, and Leone's in New Jersey, to find out whether the owners have taken his advice on board.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry convinces Geoff to go on The Dating Game to help him move on from Erica. And Murray's big surprise for Beverly backfires.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray jumps in to help Erica get over her breakup with Geoff. Adam cooks up a senior prank to cement his legacy at William Penn.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell and Cameron secretly weigh up who in the family could be suitable legal guardians for Lily if anything ever happens to them.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Gloria want to spend Mother's Day hiking with the kids, but their bickering and complaining drive Claire mad, and she brings Gloria down with her.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh: Marge directs a musical, but her leading man walks out and a thunderstorm threatens the live production..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes to Canada and refuses to leave. Marge desperately tries to get her back.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sells crystals and makes a fortune. Bart's grades take a mysterious turn for the better.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A pony groom who likes getting muddy meets a country boy with a 'bit of an edge'. And a 70-year-old joker has a date with a dance-loving 69-year-old who's into grinding.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits the historic Olde Hitching Post restaurant in Massachusetts. Tom bought the business for his daughter but refuses to let her run it.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is made anchor of a children's news programme, but it's Bart's charisma that gets noticed, and the siblings start a battle - both on and off-air.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart's coming-of-age story is told, chronicling his life from youth to adulthood. But his tense relationship with Homer and being overshadowed by Lisa shape him.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil takes Haley to visit his alma mater. Claire goes out with Mitchell and Cameron. Gloria and Jay may have to broach a delicate subject with Manny.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchetts rally for a good cause after a neighbour's house burns down, but there's a downside to their Samaritan intentions when Jay throws out his back.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh: Marge directs a musical, but her leading man walks out and a thunderstorm threatens the live production..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes to Canada and refuses to leave. Marge desperately tries to get her back.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge sells crystals and makes a fortune. Bart's grades take a mysterious turn for the better.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The Kardashians set the models a physical challenge on Santa Monica Beach, and La Toya Jackson challenges them to portray her famous brother (no, not Jermaine).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back: Marge takes Lisa on a city theatre trip to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer tells Maggie a bedtime story about the Simpson and Flanders families getting stranded when they go on holiday together to the Grand Canyon.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: Fourth instalment of the sci-fi comedy franchise with Chris Hemsworth, Tessa Thompson and Liam Neeson. An alien-obsessed rookie joins London's Men in Black team.

programme.title: Die Hard
programme.desc: Action-thriller with Bruce Willis and Alan Rickman. Can a New York cop free the hostages being held in a skyscraper by an arch villain? Yippee ki-yay... whoops, can't say that here.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Jessica, who's 28, is a real-life Bridget Jones who wants the perfect man to bring out her naughty side. Opera singer Clare, who's 21, seeks someone who hits all the right notes.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Professional dancer and virgin Raheem wants a man who can pop some moves on the dancefloor and in the bedroom. Rugby player Jerome needs a confidence boost to find his lucky lady.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: What do Britain's sharpest armchair critics think of Line of Duty, This Is My House, The Proof Is Out There, Formula 1: Drive to Survive, Countdown and This Morning.

programme.title: Celebrity First Dates
programme.desc: Can Vamps lead singer Brad Simpson, rugby league star Keegan Hirst, Bernie Clifton - without his ostrich - or Atomic Kitten Natasha Hamilton find love with members of the public.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa sets out to restore the damaged reputation of Springfield's first female inventor. Bart convinces Marge and Homer that he has sociopathy.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry convinces Geoff to go on The Dating Game to help him move on from Erica. And Murray's big surprise for Beverly backfires.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray jumps in to help Erica get over her breakup with Geoff. Adam cooks up a senior prank to cement his legacy at William Penn.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One at a Welsh Theme Park: Thrill-seeking Tom wants to give the love of his life Becca the ride of her life, as he plans their wedding at his favourite theme park.

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: We're off to a flying start as four teams of four build Lego go karts, and take to the track for an exhilarating race to the finish.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: Crabbiness creeps in as the celebs push on without a break, in a day of hustle and heat. But as the teams fly to Penang, it's the end of the line for one pair..

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: A getaway with new girl Georgia isn't as romantic as Philip had hoped... Zeyno reveals a secret. Jazz tries to move on. And Alice and Sam welcome baby Marmaduke.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay sets his sights on Sabatiello's, an Italian restaurant in Connecticut that's better known for its owner Sammy's tantrums than the food.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay meets struggling executive chef Anthony Trobiano, who's sinking under half a million dollars of debt at his restaurant in Great Neck, New York.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The fourth Commitment Ceremony has arrived. And while some couples resolve to move forward, the ceremony descends into chaos for one pair.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: There's a mood of celebration at the Couples' Retreat. Well, there is until one bride makes a snarky joke at another couple's expense..

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Emmett J Scanlan, Mark Wright, Nella Rose, Mutya Buena and Ralf Little make vegan fruit tarts and recreate their most ridiculous purchase ever.

programme.title: Soul
programme.desc: Touching Disney Pixar life-after-death-and-before-life animated adventure with Jamie Foxx and Tina Fey. A dead music teacher tries to coax a reluctant soul into a body.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's long-lost mother (guest star Glenn Close) arranges to meet him. But after she's apprehended by police, Homer must free her from a prison bus.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner cancels sport, art and music at the school to save cash, so the students - and the police - go on strike. With Michael Moore.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons go to London with $1000 that Bart found, but Homer crashes the hire car into the Queen and gets locked in the Tower. Tony Blair guest stars.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is a laughing stock when he's caught on tape running from a bear at the dump, so he hunts down the bear in an attempt to regain his dignity.
